expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly sets scope to “Verify that SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned” and includes a dedicated section “4) AGENTS docs alignment” noting “No AGENTS documentation was included… so AGENTS alignment cannot be verified.” execution_notes.md likewise states: “Attempted AGENTS alignment check, but no AGENTS evidence was available.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase docs
expectations.evidence: The output is a docs-phase artifact (a docs sync assessment) and is framed as “DOC-SYNC-001 — Docs sync check” and “Verify… docs stay aligned… and that outputs align with the primary phase: docs.” It performs comparisons of phase-contract documentation (SKILL/README/reference) and reports contract drift, which is consistent with producing a docs-focused evaluation rather than non-doc phase outputs.
